title: Specific Pizza
ast: : Mix → bulk rest 20–30 min → ball → cold ferment 2–5 days → out of fridge 2–3h before bake.
: Mix → bulk 2h → ball → ferment 8–24h at RT → bake direct.
: Mix → bulk 20–30 min → ball or straight to oiled pan → cold ferment 24–48h → 3–4h warm pan proof → bake.
: Mix → bulk 20–30 min → pan → cold ferment 24–48h → 2–3h warm pan proof → top with cheese/sauce → bake.
: Mix → rest 1h → ball → cold ferment 12–48h → oil pan → 2–3h pan proof with gentle stretching → top → bake.

: Generous olive oil coating (3–4 tbsp) on bottom and sides of 12-inch cast iron skillet. No-knead technique works well. Dough should stretch naturally to fill pan during proof. Creates crispy bottom crust with airy interior.

ast.value: Water Temp = (DDT × 3) – (Flour Temp + Room Temp + Friction Factor)

ast: Mix in salt, yeast, oil, remaining water
